stories.title: Replace giant circle markers with small pulsing dots
acceptanceCriteria: SVG marker inner circle radius is between 0.5-0.8 (maps to ~8-12px visually in the viewBox)
Pulsing outer circle radius stays proportionally small (max ~1.5-2)
Markers have a subtle glow effect via SVG filter (drop-shadow or feGaussianBlur)
No text labels are rendered directly on the SVG map by default

stories.title: Add hover tooltip for marker labels
acceptanceCriteria: Each marker has a hover interaction that shows the label text
Label appears only on hover (not always visible)
Tooltip is styled consistently with the ops display theme (monospace, accent color)
Hover target area is usable (not too tiny to click)

stories.title: Visual polish - ops display feel
acceptanceCriteria: Pulse animation is smooth and subtle (not jarring large radius changes)
Glow effect uses accent color (#00D9FF) with appropriate opacity
No other screens/pages are modified (only page.tsx and globals.css)
